name: llm-toolkit-by-shawna
description: Enterprise-grade LLM software engineer agent with multi-tool orchestration

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:tools && npm run build:memory
scripts.build:tools: npm run -w Terminal build && npm run -w WebBrowser build && npm run -w Calculator build && npm run -w Clock build && npm run -w Browserless build
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist coverage .biome-cache && npm run clean:tools
scripts.clean:tools: npm run -w Terminal clean && npm run -w WebBrowser clean && npm run -w Calculator clean && npm run -w Clock clean && npm run -w Browserless clean

author: Shawna Pakbin
